title: Moderation Update — 2026-04-29
body:
Community moderation summary for today:

Actions taken:
• spam_wave_42 — BANNED: Posted phishing links across 6 channels within 20 minutes. Immediate removal to protect members.
• toxic_runner — BANNED: Repeated targeted harassment against newcomers. Zero tolerance for hostile behavior.
• bot_like_user_77 — WARNED: Suspicious automation detected (near-identical replies in help channels). Monitoring for escalation.

Reports closed without action:
• core_maintainer (report_006) — False positive. Mass report triggered by brigading after a moderation decision. No action taken; the maintainer's standing is unaffected.
• trusted_helper (report_003) — Dispute during a moderation disagreement. No evidence of abuse found.
• new_member_17 (report_004) — Low-severity formatting issue in #introductions. No action needed.

Reminder: Please report suspicious activity through official channels. Brigading or mass-reporting to retaliate against moderation decisions is itself a violation and will be addressed.

Thank you for helping keep the community safe.
